Courses

Explore our range of academic programs and courses.

Available Courses

  1. Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
  2. Bachelor of Business Administration
  3. Bachelor of Arts in English Literature
  4. Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering
  5. Bachelor of Science in Psychology

Course Details

Each course is designed to provide students with a comprehensive understanding of the subject matter, practical skills, and opportunities for research and development.

  • Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
    1. Prof. Ali Khan
    2. Dr. Sarah Ahmed
    3. Mr. Hassan Raza
  • Bachelor of Business Administration
    1. Prof. Ayesha Malik
    2. Dr. Usman Siddiqui
    3. Ms. Hina Shah
  • Bachelor of Arts in English Literature
    1. Dr. Maria
    2. Prof. Ahmed Farooq
    3. Ms. Sana Iqbal
  • Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering
    1. Dr. Imran Qureshi
    2. Prof. Bilal Hussain
    3. Mr. Kamran Ali
  • Bachelor of Science in Psychology
    1. Dr. Fatima Noor
    2. Prof. Zainab Malik
    3. Ms. Rabia Ahmed

Department Information

Welcome to the Department Information section. Here you can find details about our academic departments.

  1. Computer Science Department
    • Programs
      • BS Computer Science
      • MS Computer Science
    • Major Subjects
      • Programming Fundamentals
      • Data Structures
      • Database Systems
      • Artificial Intelligence
      • Web Development
      • Cyber Security
    • Facilities
      • Programming Lab
      • AI Research Lab
      • High-Speed Internet
      • Digital Library
  2. Business Administration Department
    • Programs
      • BBA
      • MBA
    • Major Subjects
      • Accounting
      • Marketing
      • Human Resource Management
      • Finance
      • Entrepreneurship
    • Facilities
      • Business Incubation Center
      • Seminar Hall
      • Computer Lab
  3. English Literature Department
    • Programs
      • BS English
      • MA English
    • Major Subjects
      • English Grammar
      • Linguistics
      • Literature
      • Creative Writing
      • Communication Skills
    • Facilities
      • Language Lab
      • Digital Library
      • Reading Room
  4. Electrical Engineering Department
    • Programs
      • BS Electrical Engineering
      • MS Electrical Engineering
    • Major Subjects
      • Circuit Analysis
      • Digital Electronics
      • Power Systems
      • Control Systems
      • Robotics
    • Facilities
      • Electronics Lab
      • Robotics Lab
      • Electrical Machines Lab
  5. Psychology Department
    • Programs
      • BS Psychology
      • MS Clinical Psychology
    • Major Subjects
      • Cognitive Psychology
      • Clinical Psychology
      • Developmental Psychology
      • Research Methods
    • Facilities
      • Counseling Center
      • Psychology Lab
      • Research Room
